message:
test(search): add unit tests for search.rs helper functions

- truncate_str (5 tests with UTF-8 safety)
- parse_tags_from_metadata (4 tests)
- find_snippet (3 tests)
- SearchArgs argument parsing (4 tests)

Total: 16 new unit tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
